variants.title: Coverage gaps
variants.instruction: Find requirements, acceptance criteria, domain rules or technical decisions that should appear in the work-unit plan but are missing or lack a verifiable task.

variants.title: Overreach and scope leak
variants.instruction: Find tasks that implement items outside the work unit, outside the release scope or before required dependencies are in place.

variants.title: Implementation risk
variants.instruction: Find risks in migrations, concurrency, permissions, incomplete data, errors, rollback, testability, coupling and hard-to-reverse decisions.

variants.title: Test and gate quality
variants.instruction: Find tasks without objective acceptance criteria, sufficient tests, automated verification or required human gates for critical decisions.

lenses.title: Work unit vs source docs
lenses.focus: Compare the work-unit plan with release scope, domain, data contract, acceptance criteria and technical decision documents.

lenses.title: Task-rule-test traceability
lenses.focus: Verify that each task references rules, criteria, contracts and tests, and that every relevant work-unit item has a corresponding task.

lenses.title: Data, migrations and persistence
lenses.focus: Evaluate schema, migrations, seeds, constraints, existing data, concurrency and logical rollback impact.

lenses.title: Security, tenant and permissions
lenses.focus: Evaluate company isolation, authentication, session handling, authorization, private files, tokens, rate limits and data exposure.

lenses.title: UX, errors and operations
lenses.focus: Evaluate error states, messages, alternate flows, mobile-first behavior, observability, operational history and real-world operation.

lenses.title: Sequencing and dependencies
lenses.focus: Evaluate whether task order respects dependencies between work units, avoids rework and does not postpone critical foundations.
